final:
// // This module performs a 16-bit wide AND operation between two input vectors A and B. When the reset signal RST is asserted, the output Y is set to all ones. Otherwise, the output Y reflects the bitwise OR of inputs A and B.
module top_module(
   input [7:0] A,
   input [7:0] B,
   input RST,
   output reg [7:0] Y
);always @(*) begin
      if (RST == 1) begin
         Y <= 8'b0;
      end else begin
         Y <= A ^ B;
      end
   end

endmodule
